question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the chart data labels?

options.A: Xiaomi has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Others has the smallest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Samsung’s market share is higher than Xiaomi’s.
options.D: Huawei has the largest market share among the categories shown.

explanation: From the labels, Xiaomi has the highest share (68%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Xiaomi is largest when relying on visual comparison.
